title: hieracium murorum subsp. panaeoliceps
intro: Hieracium murorum subsp. panaeoliceps is a rare and lesser-known species of flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae), specifically a type of hawkweed native to the UK and Ireland. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. It is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and improving digestive health. Herbal preparations of Hieracium murorum subsp. panaeoliceps can be found in the form of tinctures and infusions, but further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety for human consumption.
